code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  Account(balance: a.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, String>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err("overdraft")
  else
    Ok(Account(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

let a0 = Account(balance: 100)
let a1 = deposit(a0, 50)

mut current = a1
mut status = "ok"

match withdraw(current, 30)
when Ok(next)
  current = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(current, 500)
when Ok(next)
  current = next
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{current.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
